meta.purpose: Capability stages for knowledge management — from collector to knowledge processor.
meta.load_condition: Load when user asks about improving their knowledge management practice.

stages.name: Collector
stages.description: Saves everything. Measures success by note count. Has folders and tags but no processing habit.
indicators: Asks 'how many notes do you have?'

stages.name: Processor
stages.description: Tests individual notes for knowledge asset criteria. Can distinguish raw material from knowledge. Measures success by knowledge asset count.
indicators: Distinguishes collection volume from knowledge quality
Recommends processing one note before capturing more

stages.name: Knowledge System Builder
stages.description: Builds systems where knowledge assets feed each other — one tested claim informs the boundary of another. Knowledge evolves through use.
indicators: Uses counter-examples from one domain to test another

evolution_layers.name: From collection to processing
evolution_layers.capability: Stop suggesting capture. Start testing notes for knowledge asset criteria.

measurement.what: Percentage of KM advice sessions where the agent recommends processing before capturing
measurement.how: Review agent output for capture-first vs process-first language
